programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past, or each other.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Celebrations sour in Dallas when room drama and fresh conflict shake the group.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past, or each other.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: As Ben Waddell's new girlfriend arrives to the Summer House, she and Ciara Miller bond over manicures: "This is for every bitch who said I don't make friends easily.".

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: KJ and Dara make a surprising announcement; Mia is forced to confront some hard truths about her relationship; West apologizes for his actions, which leads to a long overdue conversation.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: West and Ciara test their new friendship; a new trio of bed bugs uncover information about some fellow housemates; Carl opens the doors to Soft Bar for friends and family with some not-so-friendly encounters.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Mark Indelicato and Kelsey Swanson.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke Encore: "I Lied, I'm Sorry"; Padma Lakshmi; Max Burkholder; Thai Dang demo; Still Rise Farms; WIL: Hedgehog hospital.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: You Ripped Up His Birth Certificate?!?; Unlock: My Man Got Me & My Ex-BFF Pregnant
programme.desc: Dayrel says he's being shut out of his son's life, while Shanquelle says she's always been certain Dayrel is the father and that his doubts are the real issue; Lakaylyn was thrilled to be pregnant with her boyfriend Maurice's baby until she learned he got her best friend pregnant at the same time; Maurice says he stepped out because Lakaylyn was talking to another man.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Daisy is overwhelmed with the high-maintenance guests and struggles to ask for help, so a request from Gary sends her over the edge; when a guest injury occurs on the water toys, Capt. Glenn goes into high alert.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: In an effort to turn the charter around, Capt. Glenn takes the guests on a sail; chef Ileisha continues to leave the guests waiting too long between courses; Capt. Glenn gives her honest feedback.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Another engine issue emerges, forcing Capt. Glenn to keep the guests entertained; Daisy and Colin make up after their fight as their relationship grows stronger; Daisy confronts Gary about Mads and claims he's playing his usual games.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: After Chase confides in Gary about Alex's lackluster work ethic, Chase's trust is broken when Gary tells Alex about their conversation.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Glenn dresses up for the guests' theme night; he hopes his participation helps correct a jewelry theft hiccup and is on top of his crew to make sure the women have the best trip of their lives.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: The crew has the day off, and even Capt. Glenn recharges by enjoying Parsifal III all to himself and riding the eFoil; Colin saves the day clearing the clogged toilets, but he gets jammed up when his honest opinion strikes a chord.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Caught in an uncomfortable situation, Daisy doesn't know where she stands with Colin after keeping a massive secret from him; determined to prove Colin wrong, chef Ileisha picks herself up just to be knocked back down.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn notices the standards are slipping on Parsifal lll, as the crew is exhausted with the mid-season blues; distraught that Colin and Gary aren't speaking, Daisy takes initiative and forces them to hash out their problems.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn notices the crew is slipping on service when a guest is injured and interior doesn't hear the walkie call; after Alex and Mads confess their feelings from the start, Mads is torn between Alex and Gary.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn reprimands the crew as recent slip-ups are directly affecting communication and morale; Daisy breaks down when she's proven wrong about the walkies not working; chef Ileisha is determined to prove she can complete a 10-course dinner.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: Capt. Glenn is proud of the crew for knocking out a pride charter, but has to deliver bad news; after Gary learns about Mads' three-way kiss, he starts flirting more with Daisy, leading Colin to voice his concerns; Colin throws a gossip grenade.

programme.desc: Capt. Glenn threatens to kick one of the throuple charter guests off during a drunken guest fight; Mads receives a wake-up call that prompts her to dismiss Gary's apology attempt.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.sub-title: Man Buns It Has Been Fun
programme.desc: Proud of his team's accomplishments during the final sail, Capt. Glenn believes his tough love made them all stronger; the crew celebrates its final night out, and Daisy and Colin try to soak up every moment of it.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: Chef Ben begins to feel Daisy no longer has his back and when a demanding charter guest sends him spiraling in the galley, her attempt to step in only deepens the rift between the two heads of department.

programme.sub-title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke encore: "The Middle"; Andy Serkis; Laufey; The Chick Mission; Philly Goat Project; Girli performs; guest hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Do You Have a Secret Baby?; Truth: $1400 Is Missing!
programme.desc: Random women are calling Eve about her boyfriend, Michael, and she suspects he's cheating, but Michael insists he's been honest throughout the relationship -- with trust on the line, everything hangs in the balance as Karamo unlocks the phones; Brandi says $1,400 went missing and she believes her cousin, Damyjai, took it; Damyjai swears she has no reason to steal any money and wants to clear her name. A bond is now broken, but can it be restored? It's a case of whodunit on today's "Karamo"!

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Kyle apologizes to Paige, but underlying tensions continue with Craig; Jesse worries about his blossoming relationship with Lexi; Paige is surprised by Craig ́s concerns about her career.
